DISCOVERY 612, PRESENT: SCOTT D. WIENER, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY FOR DEFENDANTS/MOVING PARTIES. ELLAN NANCE, IN PROPRIA PERSONA, PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY. HEARING HELD. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION TO BE ADMITTED IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND REQUEST FOR STATEMENT OF DAMAGES WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE MATTERS IN DEFENDANT'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
